title: sorry: constant selects in always_* processes are not currently supported
body:
I'm getting this error from this code with iverilog 11.0:
```
    always_comb begin
        if (ac >= {1'b0,y1}) begin
            ac_next = ac - y1;
            {ac_next, q1_next} = {ac_next[WIDTH-1:0], q1, 1'b1};
        end else begin
            {ac_next, q1_next} = {ac, q1} << 1;
        end
    end
```
Is the sorry message a warning or an error and does it change how the code works? As an side, it would be really useful to have a table of what System Verilog features are supported in what version and also what plans you have on adding missing features. Icarus Verilog is still a  great tool though.
